activities.name: invoke_stream_a_sql_server_bronze
activities.description: Invokes the SQL Server Bronze ingestion pipeline pl_bronze_sqlserver_full_load as Stream A of the Bronze layer ingestion

activities.name: run_stream_b_s3_balance_ingest
activities.description: Runs the S3 bank balance ingestion notebook as Stream B of the Bronze layer. Only executes after Stream A completes successfully.

activities.name: run_stream_c_market_prices_ingest
activities.description: Runs the yfinance market price ingestion notebook as Stream C of the Bronze layer. Only executes after Stream B completes successfully.

typeProperties.body: Stream A (SQL Server Bronze Ingestion) has failed in the CSL-DE-001 pipeline.Pipeline Run ID: @{pipeline().RunId}Time: @{utcnow()}Error Details:@{activity('invoke_stream_a_sql_server_bronze').error.message}Please investigate immediately.
typeProperties.subject: [CSL-DE-001] ALERT: Stream A Bronze Ingestion Failed

activities.name: email_alert_stream_a_failure
activities.description: Sends an email alert to the Data Engineering team when Stream A SQL Server ingestion fails

typeProperties.body: Stream B (S3 Bank Balance Ingestion) has failed in the CSL-DE-001 pipeline.Pipeline Run ID: @{pipeline().RunId}Time: @{utcnow()}Error Details:@{activity('run_stream_b_s3_balance_ingest').error.message}Please investigate immediately.
typeProperties.subject: [CSL-DE-001] ALERT: Stream B Bronze Ingestion Failed

activities.name: email_alert_stream_b_failure
activities.description: Sends an email alert to the Data Engineering team when Stream B S3 ingestion fails

typeProperties.subject: [CSL-DE-001] ALERT: Stream C Bronze Ingestion Failed

activities.name: email_alert_stream_c_failure
activities.description: Sends an email alert to the Data Engineering team when Stream C daily stock price ingestion fails

activities.name: wait_spark_cluster_release
activities.description:
Waits 60 seconds between Stream B and Stream C to allow the Spark cluster 
resources from Stream B to fully release before Stream C initialises. 
Required workaround for Fabric trial capacity resource contention.

activities.name: run_silver_transformation
activities.description: Runs the Silver transformation notebook after all three Bronze streams complete successfully. Cleanses, types, deduplicates, and joins Bronze data into Silver Delta tables.

typeProperties.subject: [CSL-DE-001] ALERT: Silver Transformation Failed

activities.name: email_alert_silver_failure
activities.description: Sends an email alert to the Data Engineering team when Silver transformation fails

activities.name: run_gold_aggregation
activities.description: Runs the Gold aggregation notebook after Silver transformation completes successfully. Computes LTV ratios, applies risk flags, and writes business ready output to Gold Delta tables.

typeProperties.subject: Gold Aggregation Successful

activities.name: email_alert_gold_success
activities.description: Sends an email alert to the Data Engineering team when gold layer aggregation succeeds

typeProperties.subject: [CSL-DE-001] ALERT: Gold Aggregation Failed

activities.name: email_alert_gold_failure
activities.description: Sends an email alert to the Data Engineering team when gold layer aggregation fails
